content:
Good morning:

My name is LIANG YABIN (bill), I am 23 (twenty three) years old and born in Henan Luoyang. 
I Graduated from Zhengzhou University, My major is computer science. 
I University has had startup experience, a music platform. 
Obtain investment.
Learn a lot form business startups, design, recruit, financing, Code to product change.

Technical aspects: 
Three years experience in Node.js development.
be familiar with Vue and React.
Database MongoDB Mysql Redis.

Currently in X company as a full stack development.

All the above is my introduction, thanks.
title: To introduce myself
